title: GROUP BY query can lead to nullpointer in sesame
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph1 (subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, object TEXT);
CREATE TABLE graph2 (subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, object TEXT);
INSERT INTO graph1 (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('http://example.org/subject1', 'http://example.org/predicate1', 'http://example.org/object1');
INSERT INTO graph2 (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('http://example.org/subject2', 'http://example.org/predicate2', 'http://example.org/object2');
SELECT 'http://example.org/graph1' AS graph, COUNT(subject) AS inGraph FROM graph1 UNION ALL SELECT 'http://example.org/graph2', COUNT(subject) FROM graph2;
key_bug_features: GROUP BY query causing NullPointerException in sesame
